mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO pedestrian_flow_hourly (light_id, hour_start, avg_flow, max_flow, min_flow, total_flow, data_count) VALUES
(#{item.lightId}, #{item.hourStart}, #{item.avgFlow}, #{item.maxFlow}, #{item.minFlow}, #{item.totalFlow}, #{item.dataCount})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE avg_flow = (avg_flow * data_count + VALUES(avg_flow)) / (data_count + VALUES(data_count)), max_flow = GREATEST(IFNULL(max_flow, 0), VALUES(max_flow)), min_flow = LEAST(IFNULL(min_flow, VALUES(min_flow)), VALUES(min_flow)), total_flow = total_flow + VALUES(total_flow), data_count = data_count + VALUES(data_count)
